app.title: NcduWin — Disk Analyzer
app.subtitle: disk analyzer
tooltip.skip_heavy:
Skip detailed scanning of dependency, cache, and build directories (their sizes are still shown). Much faster. Uncheck to see every file.

Skipped directories: node_modules, vendor, .git, __pycache__, .venv, target, .gradle, .idea, .next, .nuxt, .turbo, .parcel-cache, .cache, etc.
sort.name: Name
column.name: Name
about.title: About NcduWin
about.body:
NcduWin — a modern, light-themed disk analyzer for Windows.

A native desktop tool inspired by Linux ncdu. Built with C++ and Qt 6.

Version: {version}
License: MIT
about.thanks: Inspired by ncdu by Yoran Heling. Treemap algorithm by Bruls, Houtman & van Wijk.
dialog.recycle.title: Move to Recycle Bin
dialog.delete.title: Delete permanently
dialog.delete.warn_root: Refusing to delete a top-level drive/folder.
dialog.delete.failed: One or more items could not be deleted.
properties.title: Properties
properties.name: Name
treemap.hint: Double-click a cell to enter; hover for details
msg.skipped_contents:
This directory's contents were skipped for faster scanning.

To see the full file listing, uncheck "⚡ Fast scan" in the top bar and rescan.
cleanup.title: Disk Cleanup
cleanup.failed_body:
The following items failed to clean or were partly skipped, possibly because files are in use or permissions are insufficient:

{items}
cleanup.warn_maybe_useful: May still be valuable, confirm before deleting
cleanup.remark_s_temp: System-generated temp files, completely safe to delete
cleanup.remark_s_pycache: Python compiled bytecode, can be regenerated anytime
cleanup.remark_s_tmp_files: Temporary, log, and backup files — safe to delete
cleanup.remark_a_temp: User temp directory, can be regenerated
cleanup.remark_a_build: Build output directory, can be rebuilt
cleanup.remark_a_node_modules: npm package dependencies, can be reinstalled via npm install
cleanup.remark_a_pyc: Python compiled files, auto-regenerated at runtime
cleanup.remark_b_logs: Log files may contain useful debugging info
cleanup.remark_b_backup: Backup files may still have recovery value
cleanup.remark_b_downloads: Downloaded files may still be needed
cleanup.remark_b_large_archives: Large archives may contain important data
cleanup.remark_b_recycle: Files in Recycle Bin can be restored
cleanup.remark_c_win_update: Related to system update state, cleaning may cause update issues
cleanup.remark_c_win_temp: System-level temp files, some may be in use
cleanup.remark_c_system: Core system directory, deletion will crash the system
cleanup.remark_a_browser_cache: Browser cached images and resources, can be regenerated
cleanup.remark_a_pkg_cache: Cached package files, can be redownloaded
cleanup.remark_a_prefetch: Windows prefetch data to speed up app startup, safe to clear
cleanup.remark_b_error_reports: Old error reporting logs, generally safe to delete
cleanup.remark_a_font_cache: Cached font data, will be rebuilt automatically
cleanup.remark_a_thumb_cache: Cached file thumbnails, will be regenerated when browsing
cleanup.remark_b_win_logs: System log files, may contain useful debugging information
cleanup.remark_b_recent: Shortcuts to recently used documents, no impact on data
cleanup.remark_a_ie_cache: Old IE browser cache, no longer used
cleanup.remark_b_event_logs: System event logs, contain diagnostic information
cleanup.remark_a_delivery_opt: Windows update delivery cache, safe to clear
cleanup.remark_a_shader_cache: GPU compiled shader cache, can be regenerated
